text.tspan: Addressable advertising powered by live sports data and deterministic fan intelligence,
activated in real time all season long across all open programmatic platforms.
Choose a Genius Moment package to deliver your
campaign at key in-game moments across the NFL,
Tailor segments using the Genius Fan Graph to align
with the right audience during key football moments.
Activated all from your Existing Workflow
Moment-triggered Deal IDs are distributed across
leading platforms, enabling activation across OLV,
CTV, social, and DOOH within your existing workflow.
Moment packages are charged as a percentage of media and range from 20% to 35% by
package. Football packages start at $200K, including media, $500K+ including category
exclusivity by sport, and $1M+ including pre/post insights and a research study.
CHUP OF THE YEAR IN NEW ORLEANS
